_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Skill in producing executive-level program status reporting, including milestone tracking, risk registers, budget status, and decision requests.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-S-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-S-008 (OP, cosine: 0.516), OP-T-009 (OP, cosine: 0.516).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.8/10 (raw 0.382). Shared vocabulary: [level]. DCWF-only terms [operational, participate, planning] vs WIDAI-only terms [budget, decision, executive, milestone, producing, program] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.875 (P=0.891, R=0.861). P exceeds R by 0.030 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 17 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.1%). "Participate in Operational level planning." and "Skill in producing executive-level program status reporting, including milestone" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.536 > STS 0.382 (gap +0.154). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [level] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.0%. Shared tokens: [level]. DCWF-only: [operational, participate, planning]. WIDAI-only: [budget, decision, executive, milestone, producing, program].
